revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 16:47:00
revision.text: ==Purpose== Template for creating two smaller lines of text on one actual line, this can be used for [[Template:val|scientific notations of uncertainty]] and [[Template:PhysicsParticle|physics]] symbols, such as [[Category:Nuclide templates|nuclides]] and [[Template:SubatomicParticle|particles]]. It was named after the '''<sup>''' and '''<sub>''' HTML tags, which share the first two letters of their name with this template. This template uses the third letter of the name of these tags, '''p''' and '''b''', as the name of the argument that drives the output of the top and bottom line, respectively. They are also used in combination with the letter '''a''' to set the alignment of the indivivdual lines. == Arguments == {| |'''p''' || The contents of the top line. |- |'''b''' || The contents of the bottom line. |- |'''a''' || The alignment of both lines ('''r''' for right aligned, default is left aligned) |} ==Examples== Simple example: X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X Left aligned (default): X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X Right aligned: X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X {{{p|}}}{{{b|}}}

revision.comment: Changed bottom to -0.1em

revision.text: ==Purpose== Template for creating two smaller lines of text on one actual line, this can be used for [[Template:val|scientific notations of uncertainty]] and [[Template:PhysicsParticle|physics]] symbols, such as [[Category:Nuclide templates|nuclides]] and [[Template:SubatomicParticle|particles]]. It was named after the '''<sup>''' and '''<sub>''' HTML tags, which share the first two letters of their name with this template. This template uses the third letter of the name of these tags, '''p''' and '''b''', as the name of the argument that drives the output of the top and bottom line, respectively. They are also used in combination with the letter '''a''' to set the alignment of the indivivdual lines. == Arguments == {| |'''p''' || The contents of the top line. |- |'''b''' || The contents of the bottom line. |- |'''a''' || The alignment of both lines ('''r''' for right aligned, default is left aligned) |} ==Examples== '''Simple example''': X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X '''Left aligned (default)''': X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X '''Right aligned:''' X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X '''Smaller font''': <small>X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X</small> :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X '''Larger font''': <big>X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X</big> :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X {{{p|}}}{{{b|}}}

revision.text: ==Purpose== Template for creating two smaller lines of text on one actual line, this can be used for [[Template:val|scientific notations of uncertainty]] and [[Template:PhysicsParticle|physics]] symbols, such as [[Category:Nuclide templates|nuclides]] and [[Template:SubatomicParticle|particles]]. It was named after the '''<sup>''' and '''<sub>''' HTML tags, which share the first two letters of their name with this template. This template uses the third letter of the name of these tags, '''p''' and '''b''', as the name of the argument that drives the output of the top and bottom line, respectively. They are also used in combination with the letter '''a''' to set the alignment of the indivivdual lines. == Arguments == {| |'''p''' || The contents of the top line. |- |'''b''' || The contents of the bottom line. |- |'''a''' || The alignment of both lines ('''r''' for right aligned, default is left aligned) |} ==Examples== '''Simple example''': X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X '''Left aligned (default)''': X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X '''Right aligned:''' X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X '''Smaller font''': <small>X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X</small> :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X '''Larger font''': <big>X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X</big> :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X {{{p|}}}{{{b|}}}

revision.text: ==Purpose== Template for creating two smaller lines of text on one actual line, this can be used for [[Template:val|scientific notations of uncertainty]] and [[Template:PhysicsParticle|physics]] symbols, such as [[Category:Nuclide templates|nuclides]] and [[Template:SubatomicParticle|particles]]. It was named after the '''<sup>''' and '''<sub>''' HTML tags, which share the first two letters of their name with this template. This template uses the third letter of the name of these tags, '''p''' and '''b''', as the name of the argument that drives the output of the top and bottom line, respectively. They are also used in combination with the letter '''a''' to set the alignment of the indivivdual lines. == Arguments == {| |'''p''' || The contents of the top line. |- |'''b''' || The contents of the bottom line. |- |'''a''' || The alignment of both lines ('''r''' for right aligned, default is left aligned) |} ==Examples== Simple example: X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X Left aligned (default): X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X Right aligned: X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X {{{p|}}}{{{b|}}}

revision.comment: Changed bottom to -0.1em

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:36:52
revision.text: ==Purpose== Template for creating two smaller lines of text on one actual line, this can be used for [[Template:val|scientific notations of uncertainty]] and [[Template:PhysicsParticle|physics]] symbols, such as [[Category:Nuclide templates|nuclides]] and [[Template:SubatomicParticle|particles]]. It was named after the '''<sup>''' and '''<sub>''' HTML tags, which share the first two letters of their name with this template. This template uses the third letter of the name of these tags, '''p''' and '''b''', as the name of the argument that drives the output of the top and bottom line, respectively. They are also used in combination with the letter '''a''' to set the alignment of the indivivdual lines. == Arguments == {| |'''p''' || The contents of the top line. |- |'''b''' || The contents of the bottom line. |- |'''a''' || The alignment of both lines ('''r''' for right aligned, default is left aligned) |} ==Examples== Simple example: X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X Left aligned (default): X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X Right aligned: X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X {{{p|}}}{{{b|}}}

revision.comment: Changed bottom to -0.1em

It was named after the '''<sup>''' and '''<sub>''' HTML tags, which share the first two letters of their name with this template. This template uses the third letter of the name of these tags, '''p''' and '''b''', as the name of the argument that drives the output of the top and bottom line, respectively. They are also used in combination with the letter '''a''' to set the alignment of the indivivdual lines. == Arguments == {| |'''p''' || The contents of the top line. |- |'''b''' || The contents of the bottom line. |- |'''a''' || The alignment of both lines ('''r''' for right aligned, default is left aligned) |} ==Examples== Simple example: X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X Left aligned (default): X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X Right aligned: X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X {{{p|}}}{{{b|}}}

revision.text: ==Purpose== Template for creating two smaller lines of text on one actual line, this can be used for [[Template:val|scientific notations of uncertainty]] and [[Template:PhysicsParticle|physics]] symbols, such as [[Category:Nuclide templates|nuclides]] and [[Template:SubatomicParticle|particles]]. It was named after the '''<sup>''' and '''<sub>''' HTML tags, which share the first two letters of their name with this template. This template uses the third letter of the name of these tags, '''p''' and '''b''', as the name of the argument that drives the output of the top and bottom line, respectively. They are also used in combination with the letter '''a''' to set the alignment of the indivivdual lines. == Arguments == {| |'''p''' || The contents of the top line. |- |'''b''' || The contents of the bottom line. |- |'''a''' || The alignment of both lines ('''r''' for right aligned, default is left aligned) |} ==Examples== '''Simple example''': X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X '''Left aligned (default)''': X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X '''Right aligned:''' X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X '''Smaller font''': <small>X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X</small> :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X '''Larger font''': <big>X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X</big> :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X {{{p|}}}{{{b|}}}

revision.text: ==Purpose== Template for creating two smaller lines of text on one actual line, this can be used for [[Template:val|scientific notations of uncertainty]] and [[Template:PhysicsParticle|physics]] symbols, such as [[Category:Nuclide templates|nuclides]] and [[Template:SubatomicParticle|particles]]. It was named after the '''<sup>''' and '''<sub>''' HTML tags, which share the first two letters of their name with this template. This template uses the third letter of the name of these tags, '''p''' and '''b''', as the name of the argument that drives the output of the top and bottom line, respectively. They are also used in combination with the letter '''a''' to set the alignment of the indivivdual lines. == Arguments == {| |'''p''' || The contents of the top line. |- |'''b''' || The contents of the bottom line. |- |'''a''' || The alignment of both lines ('''r''' for right aligned, default is left aligned) |} ==Examples== Simple example: X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X Left aligned (default): X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X Right aligned: X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X {{{p|}}}{{{b|}}}

revision.text: ==Purpose== Template for creating two smaller lines of text on one actual line, this can be used for [[Template:val|scientific notations of uncertainty]] and [[Template:PhysicsParticle|physics]] symbols, such as [[Category:Nuclide templates|nuclides]] and [[Template:SubatomicParticle|particles]]. It was named after the '''<sup>''' and '''<sub>''' HTML tags, which share the first two letters of their name with this template. This template uses the third letter of the name of these tags, '''p''' and '''b''', as the name of the argument that drives the output of the top and bottom line, respectively. They are also used in combination with the letter '''a''' to set the alignment of the indivivdual lines. == Arguments == {| |'''p''' || The contents of the top line. |- |'''b''' || The contents of the bottom line. |- |'''a''' || The alignment of both lines ('''r''' for right aligned, default is left aligned) |} ==Examples== '''Simple example''': X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X '''Left aligned (default)''': X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X '''Right aligned:''' X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X '''Smaller font''': <small>X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X</small> :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X '''Larger font''': <big>X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X</big> :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X {{{p|}}}{{{b|}}}

It was named after the '''<sup>''' and '''<sub>''' HTML tags, which share the first two letters of their name with this template. This template uses the third letter of the name of these tags, '''p''' and '''b''', as the name of the argument that drives the output of the top and bottom line, respectively. They are also used in combination with the letter '''a''' to set the alignment of the indivivdual lines. == Arguments == {| |'''p''' || The contents of the top line. |- |'''b''' || The contents of the bottom line. |- |'''a''' || The alignment of both lines ('''r''' for right aligned, default is left aligned) |} ==Examples== '''Simple example''': X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X '''Left aligned (default)''': X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X '''Right aligned:''' X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X :X{{su|a=r|p=aaaaa|b=b}}X{{su|a=r|p=a|b=bbbbb}}X '''Smaller font''': <small>X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X</small> :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X '''Larger font''': <big>X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X</big> :X{{su|p=a}}X{{su|b=b}}X{{su|p=a|b=b}}X {{{p|}}}{{{b|}}}
